title: Add SessionClient newtype to eliminate &Session parameter threading
description: Every one of ~40 JmapChatClient methods takes session: &Session as its first argument even though it never varies within a connection's lifetime. Add a SessionClient<'s> newtype returned by client.with_session(session) that holds both references, and move all methods onto it. Callers then write client.with_session(&session).chat_get(...) without repeating the session argument. This is a breaking API change and requires updating jmap-chat-egui as well.
close_reason: SessionClient newtype fully implemented, all tests passing
